intents.text: Add a lint script in mise-tasks/lint that performs the multi-line check.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: add a script in mise-tasks/lint "mise" that does the multi line check

intents.text: Add the new multi-line lint check to lint/_default.
Extract multi-line scripts from mise.toml into individual files in mise-tasks.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: extract the multi line scripts into individual files in mise-tasks

intents.text: The completions task was deleted from mise.toml without creating a replacement file, breaking goreleaser builds.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: no corresponding mise-tasks/completions file was created

intents.text: .gitignore has "completions" entry that hides the completions task file in mise-tasks folder.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: .gitignore has "completions" that hides the completion task

intents.text: Fix lint awk patterns to allow leading whitespace so indented run= and closing delimiters are matched.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: allowing leading whitespace for both the start (run =) and closing delimiter
